{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alchemical munitions
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Alchemical munitions refer to a variety of chemically enhanced tools and weapons utilized in combat. These items range from specialized projectiles, such as [[shaped bullets]] designed to hold a charge or incendiary rounds, to more volatile devices like smoke grenades and explosive charges. Some munitions are designed for incapacitation rather than [[destruction]], including poisoned [[needles]] or [[darts]] containing paralytic substances, as well as sedative-filled cannonballs used to subdue large creatures. Other forms include specialized canisters that can release gas or solutions capable of extreme physical effects, and portable light sources contained within glass balls. Due to their volatile nature, these explosives and incendiaries require careful handling and specialized packaging, such as ceramic cylinders, to prevent accidental detonation during transport.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alchemical munitions]] can blast bushes and chunks of islands into the air on a tide of bright blue flame.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alchemical munitions]] explode in the tower.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alchemical munitions]] were being packed by [[Tommison]] before an explosion.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
